commands.name: ban
commands.description: Permanently bans a user from the server.

commands.name: unban
commands.description: Revokes an existing ban using the user's ID.

commands.name: antiban
commands.description: Toggles protective status on a user/role to shield them from bans.

commands.name: tempban
commands.description: Bans a user for a specific duration.

commands.name: softban
commands.description: Bans and instantly unbans a user to clear their recent history.

commands.name: kick
commands.description: Removes a user from the server.

commands.name: mute
commands.description: Restricts a user from typing or speaking.

commands.name: unmute
commands.description: Restores a user's ability to type or speak.

commands.name: tempmute
commands.description: Mutes a user for a set time frame.

commands.name: warn
commands.description: Issues a formal warning to a user, logged in history.

commands.name: unwarn
commands.description: Removes a specific warning index from a user's record.

commands.name: warns
commands.description: Displays the active warning history for a specific user.

commands.name: clearwarns
commands.description: Wipes all warning records for a user.

commands.name: case
commands.description: Displays detailed information about a specific moderation action.

commands.name: lock
commands.description: Prevents regular users from sending messages in the current channel.

commands.name: unlock
commands.description: Restores regular messaging permissions to a locked channel.

commands.name: purge
commands.description: Deletes a specified amount of messages in a channel.

commands.name: shadowban
commands.description: Hides a user's messages from everyone else without notice.

commands.name: unshadowban
commands.description: Removes the shadowban status from a user.

commands.name: jail
commands.description: Restricts a user to a private, isolated channel.

commands.name: unjail
commands.description: Releases a user from the jail channel.

commands.name: lockdown
commands.description: Instantly locks all public channels in the server.

commands.name: unlockdown
commands.description: Restores the server to its normal state after a lockdown.

commands.name: announce
commands.description: Sends an embedded, formatted announcement.

commands.name: poll
commands.description: Creates a reaction-based question poll for the community.

commands.name: pin
commands.description: Pins a specific message to the top of the current channel.

commands.name: unpin
commands.description: Unpins a message from the channel.

commands.name: nuke
commands.description: Clones a channel, deletes the old one, and resets history.

commands.name: slowmode
commands.description: Sets a delay cooldown between user messages in a channel.

commands.name: filter-add
commands.description: Adds a word or phrase to the automated chat filter.

commands.name: filter-remove
commands.description: Removes a word or phrase from the automated chat filter.

commands.name: filter-list
commands.description: Displays the list of currently blacklisted words.

commands.name: emoji-add
commands.description: Adds a custom emoji to the server via an image link.

commands.name: emoji-remove
commands.description: Deletes a custom emoji from the server.

commands.name: serverinfo
commands.description: Displays comprehensive technical information about the server.

commands.name: channelinfo
commands.description: Displays details and permissions of the current channel.

commands.name: botinfo
commands.description: Shows bot ping, latency, uptime, and system status.

commands.name: invite
commands.description: Generates a secure, temporary server invitation link.

commands.name: invites
commands.description: Lists all active invite codes and their usage counts.

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Clears command calls and bot responses to keep chat tidy.

commands.name: role-add
commands.description: Assigns a specific role to a user.

commands.name: role-remove
commands.description: Removes a specific role from a user.

commands.name: role-create
commands.description: Creates a new role with custom name and permission sets.

commands.name: role-delete
commands.description: Deletes an existing role from the server database.

commands.name: role-rename
commands.description: Renames an existing role without altering its permissions.

commands.name: userinfo
commands.description: Displays a user's join date, roles, and profile details.

commands.name: avatar
commands.description: Displays a high-resolution version of a user's profile picture.

commands.name: nickname
commands.description: Changes a user's display name inside the server.

commands.name: massrole
commands.description: Assigns a specific role to all users currently in the server.

commands.name: derole
commands.description: Removes a specific role from all members who hold it.

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Retrieves the latest actions recorded in the audit log.

commands.name: deafen
commands.description: Deafens a user in their active voice channel.

commands.name: undeafen
commands.description: Restores a user's hearing in their active voice channel.

commands.name: voicekick
commands.description: Disconnects a user from a voice channel.

commands.name: voicemove
commands.description: Moves a user from one voice channel to another.

commands.name: add-bypass
commands.description: Grants a user/role immunity from the spam/word filter.

commands.name: remove-bypass
commands.description: Revokes filter immunity from a user/role.

commands.name: whitelist-add
commands.description: Adds a user's account to a secure server whitelist.

commands.name: whitelist-remove
commands.description: Removes a user's account from the server whitelist.

commands.name: status
commands.description: Updates the bot's custom status message.
